episodes.title: A Church Has Made an Controversial Decision About Pet Ownership
episodes.description:
An infamous church has put a blanket ban on pet ownership. You won't believe why!

episodes.title: The Scary New Warning For Those Taking Weight Loss Drugs!
episodes.description: Weight loss injections have exploded in popularity, but a new warning has people seriously concerned. The team breaks down the latest reports about potential side effects and what doctors are now saying about the drugs everyone seems to be taking. Plus, we ask listeners if they’ve tried them and the results are wild. A bizarre new trend online has people attempting to “speed run” their way through the headquarters at the Church of Scientology! Move over first dates there’s a new relationship term doing the rounds and ever wondered how much money the cast of Friends still makes decades later? The numbers are staggering! See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
